old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-iaui","title":"[security] Key material exposure in oscore_ctx, link_ctx, EDHOC structs (P0)","description":"oscore.h:206-234 exposes master_secret/sender_key/recipient_key in public struct (not opaque). link_ctx.c holds ed25519_sk/live keys with incomplete wipe on all error paths. EDHOC contexts hold ed_seed long-term. Many memcpy without guaranteed secure zero on all paths; relies on caller calling wipe(). No mlock/secure mem. Stack buffers wiped on some but not all early returns. Dev stubs log insecure keys.
